title: Contact Member Services
text:
NOTE: If you do not have current military ID and Department of Defense decals on your vehicle, you must obtain prior authorization for access to the yard from a USNI representative at least 24 hours prior to your visit to USNI. If this has been established, proceed to the Pass & ID office to pick up your visitor's pass.
The Pass & ID office is in front of you to the right and the parking lot is to your right.
